cnf(u20,axiom,

    activate_leg_muscles(a1)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    leap_straight_into_air(a1)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    professional_basketball_player(a1)).

cnf(u17,axiom,

cnf(u18,axiom,

cnf(u21,axiom,

for all inputs,
